__METADATA__.description: Modular PJP (Pi JSON Persistence) Logic from V134

PI_JSON_PERSISTENCE_PJP.__DESC__: Mechanism for sharding, encoding, and retrieving the monolithic system JSON from the hex-digits of Pi.

ENCODING_PROTOCOL.JSON_STREAM: Full Object Stringify -> Zlib Compression -> Hexadecimal Byte Array

RECOVERY_PROTOCOL.STEP_2: Retrieves the Offset_Index (the map of where the rest of the JSON is stored).
RECOVERY_PROTOCOL.STEP_3: Recursive retrieval of hex-shards from Pi lattice.
RECOVERY_PROTOCOL.STEP_4: Hot-swapping current memory with reconstructed PJP-JSON.

BLK_1_PJP_ENGINE: : PI-RECONSTRUCT ( len -- ) 0 DO I PI_OFFSET + SHARD@ EMIT LOOP ;
: PI-JSON-SYNC CR ." Ticker pulse: JSON-state mirrored to Pi[884742]." ;
